description:
Generate HTML for an accessible quarterly revenue table by region.
Must include caption, thead/tbody/tfoot, table aria-label, and no inline styles. Use column headers Region/Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 with scope="col". Use row headers as <th scope="row">North</th>, <th scope="row">South</th>, <th scope="row">East</th>. In <tfoot>, include <th scope="row">Total</th> and quarterly totals 29,500; 35,500; 34,100; 43,100.
